phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Clock Tower is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Relógio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese service staff typically give direct, concise directions without extra pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia local credenciado ou dirija-se ao posto de informação turística.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL krih-dehn-SEEAH-doo OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the accredited local guide or go to the tourist information point.

responses.english: Ask the accredited local guide or go to the tourist information point.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL krih-dehn-SEEAH-doo OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia local credenciado ou dirija-se ao posto de informação turística.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Clock Tower is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Relógio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Clock Tower is a key landmark within the castle grounds, often associated with the ticket office.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Maria Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Capela de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff responses avoid vague terms, preferring clear spatial references.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Capela de Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Santa Maria Chapel.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Santa Maria Chapel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Capela de Santa Maria.

phrases.text_local: Como posso chegar ao Miradouro do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo shih-GAHR OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guarda municipal ou guia local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL OHW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a municipal guard or a local guide.

responses.english: Ask a municipal guard or a local guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL OHW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte a um guarda municipal ou guia local.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Relógio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Polite but highly efficient communication is standard in Portuguese tourist venues.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vigia do miradouro ou ao guia local credenciado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL krih-dehn-SEEAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the viewpoint watchman or the accredited local guide.

responses.english: Ask the viewpoint watchman or the accredited local guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL krih-dehn-SEEAH-doo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vigia do miradouro ou ao guia local credenciado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Moorish walls are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão localizadas as Muralhas mouriscas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duhsh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh moow-REESH-kuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals value brevity and accuracy when asking for directions at historical sites.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Muralhas mouriscas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh moow-REESH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Moorish walls.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Moorish walls.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh moow-REESH-kuhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as Muralhas mouriscas.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Miradouro do Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Castle Viewpoint.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
